_comment: Pool of upcoming events for the 'Next Up on the Calendar' section. compose-draft.js automatically picks the soonest future-dated entries each week and derives the display fields and calendar link, and check-no-repeats.js allows an event to repeat weekly until its date passes. This is the ONE file worth topping up occasionally: when an event's date passes it drops out on its own, so just append new meets (name, date, optional endDate/location/url) as they get announced.
